source.purpose: The current operation plan is campaign memory and should surface in the mutable Narrator block.

operationPlan.target: Reach the sealed freight bay under the registry annex.
operationPlan.approach: Enter through the morning intake line, then split off at the service stair.
operationPlan.fallback: If challenged, pose as misfiled petitioners and retreat to the loading yard.

input.playerInput: Review the plan before we move.
